subtasks.description: Query SQL to identify publishers with declining quarterly revenue/spend trends across Q1-Q4 2024. Return publisher ID, name, and quarterly metrics (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 spend/revenue) to enable trend analysis.

Reconcile the declining publisher data with current contract state (from MongoDB) and historical performance. Classify each publisher's renewal posture (hold/expand/reduce) based on trend severity, contract value, and performance metrics. Generate renewal recommendation for each publisher.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) to fetch quarterly 2024 trends from SQL warehouse—moderate complexity due to quarterly aggregation and trend calculation across four periods; (2) cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile SQL trends with MongoDB contract state and generate renewal recommendations—this combines data from two sources (SQL history + MongoDB contracts) and includes classification/posture logic which is part of cross_recon's scope, not a separate policy_action. No multitool_plan needed; no policy_action needed (renewal recommendations are business logic, not governance compliance).

output.sql: WITH quarterly_spend AS (SELECT publisher, CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2024-04-01' THEN 1 WHEN event_date >= '2024-04-01' AND event_date < '2024-07-01' THEN 2 WHEN event_date >= '2024-07-01' AND event_date < '2024-10-01' THEN 3 WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN 4 END AS quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS quarterly_revenue FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY publisher, quarter) SELECT publisher, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 1 THEN quarterly_revenue END) AS q1_spend, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 2 THEN quarterly_revenue END) AS q2_spend, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 3 THEN quarterly_revenue END) AS q3_spend, MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 4 THEN quarterly_revenue END) AS q4_spend, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 1 THEN quarterly_revenue END) > MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 2 THEN quarterly_revenue END) AND MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 2 THEN quarterly_revenue END) > MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 3 THEN quarterly_revenue END) AND MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 3 THEN quarterly_revenue END) > MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 4 THEN quarterly_revenue END) THEN 'REDUCE' WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 1 THEN quarterly_revenue END) > MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 4 THEN quarterly_revenue END) THEN 'REDUCE' WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 4 THEN quarterly_revenue END) > MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 1 THEN quarterly_revenue END) THEN 'EXPAND' ELSE 'HOLD' END AS renewal_recommendation FROM quarterly_spend WHERE quarter IS NOT NULL GROUP BY publisher HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 1 THEN quarterly_revenue END) > MAX(CASE WHEN quarter = 4 THEN quarterly_revenue END) ORDER BY publisher

metadata.reason: MongoDB operational state not provided in upstream_outputs
metadata.details: Reconciliation requires both MongoDB current contracts and SQL historical trends. Only SQL declining_publishers query result structure is present, but actual query execution results are missing. Cannot perform LEFT JOIN reconciliation without: (1) MongoDB contract documents with entity_key, current_value, contract_terms, (2) SQL query execution results with publisher names and quarterly spend values

classification_logic.reduce: q1_spend > q2_spend > q3_spend > q4_spend (consistent decline) OR q1_spend >> q4_spend
classification_logic.hold: no consistent trend OR stable spend across quarters
classification_logic.at_risk: REDUCE trend + contract value > threshold + performance_score low
classification_logic.stable: HOLD trend + contract active + performance_score adequate
